pkgmetadata.longdescription: --httpsreadme42.com--[[](httpsimg.shields.iopypivtimedelta.svgmaxAge3600)](httpspypi.orgprojecttimedelta)[[](httpsimg.shields.iobadgeLicense-Unlicense-blue.svglongCacheTrue)](httpsunlicense.org) Installationbash [sudo] pip install timedelta Examplespython import timedelta td timedelta.Timedelta(days2, hours2) init from datetime.timedelta td timedelta.Timedelta(datetime1 - datetime2)total seconds, minutes, hours, dayspython td timedelta.Timedelta(days2, hours2) td.total.seconds180000 td.total.minutes3000 td.total.hours50 td.total.days2 Links+ [timedelta Objects](httpsdocs.python.org3librarydatetime.htmltimedelta-objects)p aligncenter a hrefhttpsreadme42.comreadme42.comap
